title: Managed-Agents role manifest
description: One engineer-role definition. Projected into a POST /v1/agents payload by sync/sync_agents.py. The persona .md body becomes the agent's `system`; `environment` binds a POST /v1/environments resource by name.

role.description: Stable role key (frontend, backend, qa, devops, _base).

extends.description: Role key to inherit defaults from (usually _base). Loader merges base then overlays this file.

coordinator.description: If true this is the routing coordinator; sync fills multiagent.agents from multiagent_roles.

name.description: Human-readable agent name (unique per workspace; sync matches existing agents by this name).

persona.description: Repo-relative path to the agent .md whose body (frontmatter stripped) becomes `system`. Omit for a coordinator that sets `system` inline.

system.description: Inline system prompt, used when `persona` is absent (e.g. the coordinator).

system_append.description: Extra system text appended after the persona/base guard block (role-specific guardrails).

environment.description: Basename (no .json) of an environments/*.json this role binds to.

tools.description: Passed through verbatim as the agent `tools` array. Each entry is an agent_toolset_20260401 or mcp_toolset with permission_policy/config.

mcp_servers.description: Passed through as the agent `mcp_servers` array. ${VAR} in string values is expanded from the environment at sync time.

skills.description: Agent skills passthrough (filesystem skill bundles are uploaded separately; names/ids only here).

multiagent_roles.description: Coordinator only: role keys this agent may delegate to. sync resolves each to {type:agent,id,version}.

services.description: Informational credential-grant summary (drives the self-hosted worker's mounted secrets; not sent to the API).

a2a.description: OPTIONAL A2A projection hints for this role's Agent-Card skill (mirrors contracts/a2a/v1/schema/role-a2a-extension.schema.json). Every field has a derived default; the card projection reads role/name/description/services/metadata even when this block is absent. Adding this block is the schema follow-on the A2A contract flagged.

publish.description: false hides this role from the public card (still reachable on the extended card for allowlisted callers).

extendedOnly.description: true publishes the skill ONLY on the authenticated extended card, never on the anonymous well-known card.

tags.description: Extra tags merged with the derived tags (derived tags are never removed).

examples.description: Example prompts a caller can send to this skill — the primary discovery signal a calling agent uses; strongly recommended.

scopes.description: OAuth scopes required for THIS skill, projected into the skill's securityRequirements.
